Container.Name: telegram-archive-viewer
Container.Overview: Read-only web interface for browsing Telegram messages archived by the Telegram Archive backup container. Search messages, view media, and browse chat statistics with optional authentication. [br][br] [b]Requires the Telegram Archive backup container[/b] to have run at least once. Point the backup paths to the same directories used by the backup container (read-only recommended). [br][br] More info: https://github.com/GeiserX/Telegram-Archive
Container.ExtraSearchTerms: telegram backup viewer chat messages archive browse
Container.Requires: Telegram Archive backup container with existing backup data

Config.Name: Backups
Config.Description: Backup data directory (read-only, shared with backup container)

Config.Name: Database
Config.Description: SQLite database directory (read-only, shared with backup container)

Config.Name: Username
Config.Description: Web viewer login username (empty = no auth)

Config.Name: Show Stats
Config.Description: Show chat statistics in the viewer
